title: cyperus retrorsus var. cylindricus
intro: Cyperus retrorsus var. cylindricus, also known as the cylindrical umbrella sedge, is a type of plant that belongs to the family Cyperaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Cyperus retrorsus var. cylindricus include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory health, and support immune function. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to treat various health conditions, including bronchitis, coughs, and fever.
